value.found_quote: Create `.claude/security-patterns.yaml` to add regex or substring rules to the [per-edit pattern check](#on-each-file-edit). These run as deterministic string matches alongside the built-in patterns
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes adding custom per-edit patterns via a security-patterns.yaml (or .yml/.json) file with regex or substring rules, matching the claim. The plugin is described as available on all plans with no deprecation notice.
